action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 1 DDP training failed with exit code 1, no trace. Iter 2 test.py passed on single GPU (dataset, model loading, forward). Analysis: DDP error likely due to OOM or environment issue. Decision: fix train.py with proper error handling, smaller batch_size=4 per GPU, mixed precision, offline env vars, and run for 5 epochs to get baseline. Additionally, add validation mIoU tracking (all-gather confusion matrix) to measure metric and select best checkpoint.
